docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GIBBLE, DON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED".
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-04-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,890.00 FILED BY JONES, COLIN AS TO DEFENDANT GIBBLE, DON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GIBBLE, DON
REQUEST FOR FEE WAIVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, COLIN

ORDER ON REEQUEST FOR FEE WAIVER DENIED. THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE THE INFORMATION YOU PROVIDED ON THE REQUEST SHOWS THAT YOU ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR THE FEE WAIVER YOU REQUESTED:BECAUSE THERE IS SUFFICIENT ASSETS TO ALLOW FOR PAYMENT OF FEES WITHOUT HARDSHIP.

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES, DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF STATES THAT HE WAS NEVER GIVEN A COPY OF HIS CLAIM THAT HE FILED THEREFORE WAS NOT AWARE THAT HE HAD TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE WITH THE COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: EVYN SHOMER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
